title: persona-atoms v1 persona composition
description: A persona composition assembles voice-profile + role-definition + behavioural-constraints + knowledge-boundaries + tone-parameters into a complete identity an agent can assume. Every composition must satisfy the prompt-conformance rule: it must be renderable to a deterministic system-prompt string from the bound atoms alone.

id.description: URL-safe slug; unique within the personas/ directory.

role_definition.description: Reference to the role-definition atom that anchors this persona's purpose.

voice_profile.description: Reference to the voice-profile atom governing surface-form characteristics.

behavioural_constraints.description: Zero or more behavioural-constraint atoms. The persona obeys all of them unconditionally.

knowledge_boundaries.description: One or more knowledge-boundary atoms. Every persona MUST declare at least one (boundary-coverage rule).

tone_parameters.description: Reference to the tone-parameter atom setting this persona's affective profile.

extends_brand.description: Optional reference to a brand-atoms brand for voice continuity. When present, the persona's voice inherits the brand's guidelines.

system_prompt_template.description: Optional: an explicit Mustache-style template used during rendering to assemble the system prompt from the bound atoms. If absent, the runtime uses its default rendering algorithm.

vendors.description: LLM families this persona is known to work well with.

version.description: Version of the referenced atom at composition time.
